evaluations.summary: The markdown <scope> exclusions do not match the contract out_of_scope list exactly and include overlapping entries.
evaluations.evidence_location: Artifact markdown <scope> section, 'Not in scope' list; Artifact contract JSON, out_of_scope
evaluations.why_it_matters: ARB-006 requires a single deduplicated exclusion set with exact alignment between contract out_of_scope and markdown <scope>. The markdown lists extra exclusions beyond the contract and includes overlapping concepts, which creates conflicting scope boundaries for downstream governance and review.

notes: The markdown not-in-scope list has 9 items, while contract out_of_scope has 5.

Examples of overlapping exclusions in markdown include "Creating tools or workflows" vs "Tool creation (that is llm-tool-builder)" and "Workflow creation", and "Writing implementation code" vs "Code implementation".
